demand_drivers: character respecs after completing Den of Evil quest rewards
supply_notes: crafted from four essences dropped by act bosses (Andariel/Duriel, Mephisto, Diablo, Baal)
supply is steady — essences drop frequently

common_quote_units: Pul Rune or Lem Rune (low value)
segment_sensitivity: low value — pricing noise may dominate signal
similar price across ladder and non-ladder
known_model_risks: low absolute price means small Ist fractions
may not have enough Ist-paired trades for reliable VWAP
consider modeling in FG or Pul/Lem units instead

traderie.notes: Likely has sufficient trade volume for basic pricing, but Ist-pair volume may be low.

reddit.notes: Use for demand, sentiment, confusion points, source discovery, and item-profile updates.

rmt_sites.notes: External cash-market signal only. Do not present as a recommendation to buy or sell.

research_notes.note: Initial draft profile. Low-value commodity. Pricing may need alternative unit.

open_questions: Does Token trade volume on Traderie support Ist-pair pricing or should it be quoted in PGems / FG?
Is there enough non-ladder volume to include?
